name: Strategy Room
bestFor: Converting evidence, design, and readiness into authorized action

steps.label: REVIEW
steps.caption: Review the qualified brief and decision context.

steps.label: CHALLENGE
steps.caption: Surface unresolved risk, evidence gaps, and tradeoffs.

steps.label: ALIGN
steps.caption: Confirm shared intent, constraints, and authority.

steps.label: COMMIT
steps.caption: Authorize movement when conviction is sufficient.

steps.label: MOVE
steps.caption: Prepare the decision for execution handoff.

capabilities.label: QDS
capabilities.description: Future decision qualification and commitment readiness layer.

capabilities.label: VMG
capabilities.description: Future movement handoff from authorized decision into adaptive execution.

capabilities.label: Docente
capabilities.description: Future learning capture from decision outcomes.

integrationSlots.label: QDS Commitment Gate
integrationSlots.description: Decision and commitment qualification will integrate here.

integrationSlots.label: VMG Execution Handoff
integrationSlots.description: Authorized movement will hand off to adaptive execution systems.

integrationSlots.label: Docente Decision Learning
integrationSlots.description: Decision outcomes will become future learning inputs.

visual.alt: Executive strategy room with long decision table, city window view, and violet ambient light
